title: potentilla tyrolensis
intro: Potentilla tyrolensis is a plant species native to the European Alps, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and tannins. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing pain and swelling, treating wounds, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Potentilla tyrolensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
